subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all mention and utterance and whatsoever existeth in creation, beseemeth the court of the Best-Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان و ما فی الامکان بساط محبوب عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
